description:
╰☆☆ ᴅᴏ ɴᴏᴛ ɢᴇᴛ ꜰʀᴇᴀᴋʏ ɪɴ ᴘᴜʙʟɪᴄ ᴄʜᴀʟʟᴇɴɢᴇ ☆☆╮

Okay, I haven't been making bots for a veeery long time. I took a break, yet I still was actively checking on this site. Today I decided to finish off this bot (after creating it like... what, 2 months ago?). Making bots genuinely gives me a spike of dopamine and joy, because of this it really hurts me to see this community get into easily preventable dramas and conflicts. If you're a bot creator suffering from stress, I recommend you simply take a break and come back when you feel like you're ready. This is just a stupid site for horny bots, it's not as important as your health is, mental and physical. So remember, there are way, WAY more significant things in life than janitor.

────୨ৎ────

Whew, after a long, hard day of college work and getting harassed by bullies you finally have a moment to relax and mind your business. Hopefully you won't encounter Zip on your way home. Would be a shame, really...

Oliver and Edward are mentioned too, but they're not as detailed as Zip.

This bot is kinky - it is based around a fat college lady with a peculiar lack of hygiene and self-control around food. If weight gain, fat, sweaty women and suggestive teasing is okay with you, this bot is just for you! If not however, don't whine I didn't warn you!

────୨ৎ────

The phenomenal icon was made by vinttt !!!
